{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query is whether cariprazine is effective for treating bipolar disorder. Reviewing the provided documents, Document [2] (Title: Atypical Antipsychotic Agents -- Indications -- FDA-Approved Indications) explicitly states that cariprazine is FDA-approved for bipolar I disorder, major depressive disorder, and schizophrenia. This indicates that cariprazine has been formally approved for use in bipolar disorder, which implies efficacy based on regulatory approval. Additionally, Document [19] (Title: Antipsychotic Medications -- Indications -- Indications) lists cariprazine as an FDA-approved second-generation antipsychotic for bipolar I disorder. These sources confirm that cariprazine is not only approved but also used in the treatment of bipolar disorder. Therefore, based on FDA approval and clinical indications, cariprazine is effective for treating bipolar disorder.", "answer_choice": "A"}
